message:
feat(browser): add BM25 full-text search fallback for NEAR queries

When no vector column exists, NEAR queries now fall back to BM25
text search instead of throwing an error. Includes:

- Tokenization with stop word filtering
- Inverted index building for text columns
- BM25 scoring algorithm (k1=1.2, b=0.75)
- Top-K result selection by score
- E2E tests for text search functionality
